projects.name: Instant Msg - Real-Time Chat Application
projects.short_description: A modern real-time chat application with temporary room-based messaging, built using React, Node.js, and Socket.IO.
projects.detailed_description: Instant Msg is a full-stack real-time communication platform that enables users to create or join temporary chat rooms using unique room codes without requiring registration or permanent data storage. Built with React, Node.js, Express.js, and Socket.IO, the application provides instant messaging, online user presence, typing indicators, join and leave notifications, emoji support, voice messaging, and a responsive user interface. The project demonstrates practical implementation of WebSocket-based real-time communication, room management, and cloud deployment using Vercel and Render.
features: Temporary chat rooms with unique room codes
Instant user join and leave notifications
Auto scroll and smart chat navigation
Cloud deployment using Vercel and Render

projects.name: ML Multi-Model System
projects.short_description: A Streamlit-based platform integrating multiple machine learning models for real-time predictions.
projects.detailed_description: ML Multi-Model System is an interactive machine learning platform developed using Streamlit that combines multiple predictive models into a single application. The system enables users to perform Email Spam Detection, Handwritten Digit Classification, and House Price Prediction through an intuitive web interface. Users can provide input data and receive instant predictions generated by trained machine learning models. The project demonstrates the practical deployment of machine learning solutions through a unified and user-friendly interface.
features: Multiple ML models in one application

projects.name: PDF RAG Assistant
projects.short_description: An AI-powered PDF Question Answering system using RAG, FAISS, embeddings, and Google Gemini.
projects.detailed_description: PDF RAG Assistant is an intelligent document question-answering application that enables users to upload PDF documents and interact with them through a ChatGPT-style conversational interface. The system extracts text from uploaded PDFs, converts the content into vector embeddings using Sentence Transformers, stores them in a FAISS vector database, retrieves the most relevant document chunks through semantic search, and generates context-aware responses using Google Gemini. The project demonstrates Retrieval-Augmented Generation, vector databases, semantic search, embeddings, and Large Language Model integration in a practical real-world application.

projects.name: To-Do List App
projects.short_description: A full-stack task management application for creating, managing, and tracking daily tasks.
projects.detailed_description: To-Do List App is a full-stack task management system designed to help users organize and track their daily activities efficiently. The application provides a clean and responsive interface where users can create, view, update, and delete tasks. The frontend is developed using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, while the backend is built using Node.js and Express.js. Task data is stored in MongoDB, ensuring persistence across sessions. The project demonstrates CRUD operations, REST API development, user interaction handling, and full-stack web application architecture.

projects.name: Weather App
projects.short_description: A modern weather application that provides real-time weather information for cities worldwide.
projects.detailed_description: Weather App is a responsive web application built using React and Vite that allows users to check real-time weather conditions for any city around the world. The application integrates with the OpenWeatherMap API to retrieve weather data including temperature, weather conditions, humidity, and wind speed.

projects.name: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.short_description: A modern developer portfolio showcasing projects, skills, certifications, and achievements.
projects.detailed_description: A fully responsive personal portfolio website built to showcase projects, technical skills, certifications, achievements, and contact information. The portfolio features a modern glassmorphism design, smooth animations using Framer Motion, dedicated project showcase pages, responsive layouts, and resume functionality.

projects.name: Stock Market Price Prediction
projects.short_description: A deep learning-based stock market forecasting system that predicts future stock prices using LSTM neural networks.
projects.detailed_description: Stock Market Price Prediction is a machine learning and deep learning application developed to forecast future stock prices using Long Short-Term Memory neural networks. The system retrieves historical stock market data from Yahoo Finance, preprocesses the data using MinMaxScaler, and trains an LSTM model to identify patterns and trends in stock prices.

projects.name: TravelGuardian AI
projects.short_description: AI-powered smart tourism planning and safety platform with real-time map integration and multi-agent systems.
projects.detailed_description: TravelGuardian AI is an intelligent tourism planning and traveler safety platform designed to enhance travel experiences using Artificial Intelligence. The system leverages multi-agent AI architecture to provide personalized travel recommendations, route planning, weather insights, safety alerts, and destination guidance.

projects.name: E-Commerce Platform
projects.short_description: A full-stack e-commerce store with payment integration.
projects.detailed_description: A React and Vite storefront paired with a Node.js and Express backend that supports authentication, product search, cart and order flows, admin management, and payment checkout.
